name: Halloween: Spider Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cake batter and gelatin according to package directions. Use 9-inch round cake pans for the cake.
2. Cut a smaller circle out of one cake layer to serve as the head. Fill the hole left over with gelatin mixture.
3. Place the other cake layer on top and trim to shape.
4. To prepare the frosting, mix blue food coloring into chocolate frosting until it reaches a black color.
5. Frost the entire cake with the black frosting.
6. Use black licorice as legs and gumballs (2 big green for eyes, 6 little ones) for additional decorations.
